## What does this PR do?

<!-- One or two sentences on the change. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New app added to the JellyStack store
- [ ] Existing app updated (version bump, config tweak)
- [ ] Panel feature / bug fix
- [ ] Translation (add / update `messages/*.json`)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes (for panel changes)
- [ ] `pnpm i18n:check` passes (for translation changes)
- [ ] `docker compose config` passes on every modified `docker-compose.yml`
- [ ] Image digests in `docker-compose.yml` are pinned (`sha256:...`)
- [ ] `umbrel-app.yml` `id` starts with `jellystack-`
- [ ] README / docs updated if the user-facing behavior changed
